subject: Simisage, a green simian Pokemon with leaf-tipped crown and tail, leaping through a sunlit forest canopy
description: A bright, kinetic illustration of Simisage mid-leap through a dense leafy canopy. The green-furred simian Pokemon has a darker green dorsal mane, pale cream face and chest, and signature leaf-frond crests sprouting from its head and tail tip. It is captured in motion with arms outstretched, sun-dappled light filtering through the surrounding palm-like fronds. The composition is forward-facing and energetic, framed by overlapping foliage in saturated greens with patches of warm yellow light. The mood reads playful and wild, leaning into the flavor-text note about its ill-tempered, tail-swinging combat style.
foreground: Simisage mid-leap with arms extended, surrounded by drooping palm-like fronds
background: dense forest canopy with overlapping leaves and dappled sunlight
